children.heading: Actual stamp
children.label: 1 Actual stamp
children.text: The term “actual stamp” means a Migratory Bird Hunting and Conservation Stamp required under the Migratory Bird Hunting and Conservation Stamp Act ( et seq.) that is printed on paper and sold through the means established by the authority of the Secretary immediately before .16 U.S.C. 718aDecember 18, 2014

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “automated licensing system” means an electronic, computerized licensing system used by a State fish and wildlife agency to issue hunting, fishing, and other associated licenses and products.

children.heading: Inclusion
children.label: B Inclusion
children.text: The term “automated licensing system” includes a point-of-sale, Internet, telephonic system, or other electronic applications used for a purpose described in subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: is a unique identifier for the individual to whom it is issued;

children.label: B
children.text: can be printed on paper or produced through an electronic application with the same indicators as the State endorsement provides;

children.label: C
children.text: is issued through a State automated licensing system that is authorized, under State law and by the Secretary under this subchapter, to issue electronic stamps;

children.label: D
children.text: is compatible with the hunting licensing system of the State that issues the electronic stamp;

children.label: E
children.text: is described in the State application approved by the Secretary under ; andsection 718q(b) of this title

children.label: F
children.text: may contain an image of the actual stamp.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
